name: Patient 5
history: Recurrent pattern of starting new ideas and abandoning projects. Family difficulty involving father; wrote forgiveness letter.
intermediate_belief: I never finish anything because I'm not capable of seeing things through.
intermediate_belief_depression: I'm fundamentally flawed in my ability to commit and complete tasks.
coping_strategies: Starting new projects as distraction, abandoning when challenges arise.
situation: Working on a personal project involving website development.
auto_thought: I'll probably give up on this like everything else.
behavior: Work on website project with anticipation of eventual abandonment.
